barRaise.topFinding: The body shipped hard (eight deployed releases 0.34.5 through 0.42.1 on 2026-06-02, monetization formally settled via Decision 30), but three HIGHs stand. The dashboard writer scripts/write-dashboard-status.ps1 still rebuilds YaC.json from scratch and re-blanks barRaise + audit on every release (eighth review, live JSON still reads barRaise:null). The decision-slot collision was 'fixed' by deleting the monetization decision body, so N6 / BACKLOG / PROJECT_SPEC / changelog now point at a Decision 30 that does not exist. And the basket-coordinate data-integrity HIGH did not close, it got camouflaged: N6 gates fairway metadata, not basket coords, so the 99.8%-incomplete basket problem stays ungated while looking handled. Fix the writer first; it is a fifteen-line read-modify-write that gates whether this report survives the next release.
